rest_circ_desk.description: Circulation desk is the service point for physical inventory.

code.description: The circulation desk code. Should be used in subsequent queries.

primary.description: Whether the circulation desk can perform check-out and check-in services for another library.

reading_room_desk.description: Whether the circulation desk serves a reading room.

location_to_move_items.description: Relevant when reading_room_desk is true. Can be empty.

restore_from_reading_room_at_checkin.description: Whether the circulation desk restore items to permanent location when scan in at reading room desk. Relevant when reading_room_desk is true and location_to_move_items is not empty. This functionality is under constructions and will be available as part of the May 2023 release

picks_from_shelf.description: Whether the circulation desk can pick up items from the shelf.

supports_personal_delivery.description: Whether the circulation desk can process personal delivery requests for users.

supports_registering_new_users.description: Whether the circulation desk can register new users that do not exist in Alma.

supports_overriding_return_date.description: Whether to have the Override return date and time option available on the Return Items page.

hours_to_reshelve.description: The period of time that the item is considered as available.

minutes_delay_for_hold_notification.description: How long Alma waits before sending a hold notification to a patron.

default_printer.description: The default printer associated with the circulation desk.

creates_return_receipts.description: Whether receipts will automatically be printed at the circulation desk.

return_receipt_destination.description: Relevant when creates_return_receipts is selected. The destination for the return receipt.

creates_loan_receipts.description: Whether loan receipts to automatically be printed at the circulation desk.

loan_receipt_destination.description: Relevant when creates_loan_receipts is selected. The destination for the loan receipt.

has_hold_shelf.description: Whether the circulation desk has a hold shelf.

hold_shelf_sorting.description: Relevant when has_hold_shelf is selected. The criteria by which hold shelf items are sorted.

maximum_days_on_hold_shelf.description: Displayed only when has_hold_shelf is selected. The maximum number of open days that an item can stay on the hold shelf.

has_hold_shelf_processing.description: Displayed only when has_hold_shelf is selected. Whether the circulation desk can store items that need to be processed before arriving at the hold shelf.

notify_patron_of_canceling_expired_hold.description: Whether to notify the patron when their item on the hold shelf has expired.

supports_digitization.description: Whether the circulation desk supports digitization.

work_time_days.description: Relevant when supports_digitization is true. Indicates the number of days for which the item is unavailable.

accept_credit_card.description: Whether the circulation desk can accept payment by credit card.

accept_debit_card.description: Whether the circulation desk can accept payment by debit card.

accept_cash.description: Whether the circulation desk can accept payment by cash.

accept_online.description: Whether the circulation desk can accept payment performed online.

accept_check.description: Whether the circulation desk can accept payment by check.

print_receipt.description: Whether the circulation desk can print a receipt.

receipt_email.description: The e-mail address to which receipts for payment to be sent.

has_self_check.description: Whether the circulation desk allows patrons to check in and check out resources using a self-check machine.

integration_profile.description: Integration Profile of type Self-Check, related to desk. Relevant when has_self_check is selected.

terminal_password.description: The terminal's password. Relevant when has_self_check is selected.

location_type.description: The location type code. Possible codes are OPEN/CLOSED/REMOTE as listed in the 'HLocation.locationType' code-table.

work_order_type_code.description: Work order type code. Desc attribute holds the name.

work_order_time_days.description: The number of days for which the work order to be handled by the circulation desk.

additional_printer_details.description: Additional printer associated with the circulation desk.
